author: Jake M
text: Best board I've owned. Paddles like a longboard and flies on anything chest high and under. Tom nailed it.

author: Sarah K
text: Really stoked with my custom. Tom took the time to understand what I was after and the end result is spot on. Would recommend to anyone.

author: Dan R
text: Lives up to its name. I've surfed it in everything from 1ft closeouts to solid overhead and it just works.
